info.name: Techno Online Store - Favorites API
info.description:
Favorites (Wishlist) API for tenant store customers.

Base URL: {{tenant_url}}/api

Set `tenant_url` to the tenant subdomain, e.g. `https://store1.example.com`

request.description: Toggle a product as favorite. If the product is already favorited, it will be removed (unfavorited). If not favorited, it will be added. Requires authentication.

response.name: Validation Error (422)

request.description: Get paginated list of the authenticated user's favorite products. Each item includes product details with price, image, and categories. Requires authentication.

response.name: Success (200)
